case_title: CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. LINDA LI ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1100 GOUGH STREET, UNIT 8F, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT**SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED FEB-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARILLON ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LI, LINDA AN INDIVIDUAL
